title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.353 - No safety inspection required during registration period which exceeds two years
text:
307.353.  No safety inspection required during registration period which exceeds two years. — Other provisions of law notwithstanding, no person shall be required to have a biennial vehicle inspection during a registration period which exceeds two years.  The inspection required at the beginning of the registration period shall be valid for the entire registration period.
(L. 1974 H.B. 1526, A.L. 1999 S.B. 19) 
Effective 7-01-00
